summary:
TRUMP FAMILY VISIONS: Brandon shares a detailed prophetic vision involving a towering, newly constructed Trump building in Miami featuring AI technology and blockchain matrix codes. He describes Eric Trump guiding animated cryptocurrency coins into the structure. Brandon also recounts seeing Donald Trump Jr. facing a massive tornado that shrinks due to intercessory prayer, though Don Jr. experiences severe facial burning.

MIDDLE EAST GEOPOLITICS: Brandon foresees the total decimation of Iran's infrastructure, sending the nation back to the Stone Age and breaking its grip on Iraq. Consequently, Iraq experiences massive economic prosperity, wealth, and the removal of Iranian puppet leaders. Additionally, Brandon envisions MBS rising to unprecedented power and Jared Kushner negotiating a two-state solution for Israel.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Brandon observes Russia maintaining its conquered territories in Ukraine while devising a plan to eliminate Volodymyr Zelensky and install a proxy government. He notes a protective golden barrier around Taiwan and a massive economic and tourism boom in Cuba. Furthermore, Brandon anticipates a conflict involving Turkey asserting control over the Black Sea straits and Kim Jong-un being utilized as a pawn by China and Russia.

UNITED STATES POLITICS: Brandon predicts a significant political shift, describing a red wave sweeping across California and Minnesota due to citizen outrage over corruption and current leadership. He envisions Republicans maintaining control of the House by over twenty seats and narrowly winning the Senate.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon warns of severe retaliation from hidden cells within the United States, including attacks on power grids, substations, and banking systems. He specifically cautions about saboteurs causing a massive oil spill in the Gulf, as well as drone attacks at major public gatherings like baseball stadiums and marathons. Brandon emphasizes the presence of a government mole leaking sensitive national security information.

SPIRITUAL REFLECTIONS AND HEALING: Brandon reflects on his personal spiritual journey, comparing his hidden years as a church janitor to deep roots that sustain sudden ministry growth. He also experiences words of knowledge, declaring divine healing for individuals suffering from severe heart conditions, clogged arteries, and poor circulation.
rawData: [April 07, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/zaCMLnzdWHQ]-[Good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. I think my mic's good. We're going to just go over some things that the Lord showed us last night in prayer. And boy, what a time of prayer we had last night. If anybody joined us last night, I encourage you to go back. You can fast forward the first 30 minutes if you don't want to be a part of that. But there was a lot that the Lord showed us for the future and what's coming. There was a lot of detail to these visions. There were a lot of things that I don't feel comfortable sharing right now on a live forum, but I will share what I feel in my heart that I can share, the detail of what keeps me in a good river. That's a good way to say it, maybe. I don't know. But okay, let's go over some of the things. Do you want to talk about what was going on in the news first? Whatever. That's the building. What is that building? Where is that? They're voting on it. I think it's the AI. Is that a fake building, son? No. But this is Don Jr.; Eric Trump posted this. He said, 'First look at Donald Trump officially here. I poured my heart and soul into this project with an incredible team.' Well, it doesn't have the AI on the side of the building, though. It doesn't have LED screens. I saw LED screens on the side of the building and it was the tallest Trump building they have built. Now, as I was watching this Trump building, it was all at the top just like this. Well, that's pretty cool, son. That's probably what I was seeing right there. But it looked like in the vision—well, you can go ahead and show them that. That's pretty substantial. That's pretty cool. Do you have it? Are they seeing it? I didn't see on the inside of it. How beautiful. So, it has a ballroom in it? I don't know if this is Trump's ballroom or like he mixed it. Okay. So, where is this? Miami, Florida. So, he's building it in Miami. 'First look at Donald Trump officially here. Over the past six months, I poured my heart into this project with my incredible team at Donald Trump.' So, the building actually exists right now. I haven't looked into it. Let me see. This looks like AI footage. You know, the base of the building doesn't look like that in the vision. I don't see the presidential seal and all that. Whenever I saw Baron going up the steps, it was all glass front like that. And do you see how the pictures are all in the side like that? I didn't see that. It looked really fat at the bottom, but as it went up, it got skinnier, but there was actual like pictures on the side of this building that had holograms that look like AI technology. And so, I know when you're looking over in the spirit and you're looking at something, some things are symbolic. It's not necessarily that it's going to be AI on there. I don't know because let me just talk about it for those that didn't. You don't have to show me no more. Okay. I saw Eric Trump last night and I saw Don Jr. last night as we were praying for the family. And Don Jr. was standing away from Eric in this vision. He was probably a good hundred yards away. Looked like he was this way from him and within running distance. I don't want to see it; it's distracting me. As you scroll, I have to focus. This is really important. I'm trying to look into the vision and I see colors. So, as I was looking into this, I could see Eric with this white shirt on, with a striped-looking tie on that was very colorful and beautiful, and his hair was blowing. It looked like he has a lot of gel or some kind of product in his hair that's not going to move his hair, but in the vision, his hair was moving and he was very distressed on his face as he was watching his brother. And I could see Don Jr. standing on these steps. Let me pray real quick. Father, I take authority over every demonic spirit that would try to hinder me in any way tonight. I apply the blood of Jesus over my house, over me, my wife, my children. And I thank you, Lord, for being uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I take authority over hexes and vexes. All kinds of satanic attack try to come against us. We apply the blood and we thank you, Lord, that every tongue that rises against us, we condemn it. It will not bear fruit. It falls to the ground and it will not bear fruit. We thank you, Lord, that the angels of the Lord are gathered all around and about this house. Father, I thank you, Lord. My thoughts are clear and I speak clear. And I thank you, Lord, in the name of Jesus, for your hand on our home and on my children, my wife, and us in Jesus' name. Thank you for our angels. Amen and amen. All right. Well, as I was looking into this, I saw Don Jr. on the steps and I saw a massive tornado. And this tornado was whipping all around Don Jr., and it was so much so that when you see tornadoes, if you're really close to them, from the debris coming off of the tornado, it will actually send things into your skin. It's like sandblasting; the force of the wind is so much it tears the flesh up. It will tear your flesh up just by being next to it because of how fast the winds are blowing. And when you take a projectile like a straw or a piece of hay or something, it can actually penetrate through your body like a bullet. It's that serious. Like logs or rocks or whatever blowing at 300 miles an hour. And so it actually will cause damage from the shrapnel—is what I want to call the shrapnel. Well, as I saw this tornado, it looked like an EF5 went right up to Don Jr. that was blowing so hard it was tearing his flesh on his face, and he was standing there and it looked like he was in agonizing pain. As we were praying, this tornado that was sent to him started to shrink in front of him. It was just about three feet out from him. And the tornado was not allowed to engulf him, but it started to shrink. And as it started to shrink, it became smaller and smaller to the point that it was the size of a bottle of water. Say it was like this. You see this? So this is like 11 ounces. Okay. So it's about like that. It was so that you could put it in his hand. It was a tornado that was so massive that filled all of downtown New York. I could see Trump Tower. It was all at the bottom. I could see the letters Trump and it was the building where they have the main Trump headquarters, the main Trump building in New York. I could see this major tornado that was headed for Don Jr. and it was so close to him that it was actually causing and inflicting wounds on his face. It shrunk as it went down, and we started to intercede and pray for the protection of the Trump family. The force of the wind was so powerful that it was taking Eric Trump's tie and it was lifting it up toward the storm. I could see him in a panic looking at his brother, saying you're in harm's way, and he was reaching his hands for his brother trying to help him. But Don Jr. stood there and his face looked very strange to me as he started to have holes in his face and he started burning from the inside out. And his face was burning. Do you know how when you light a match on a piece of paper and it spreads if you light a circle and it burns like this and it's opening and getting bigger and bigger as you see something burning? It was doing that on splotches on his face, but as you were looking at his face, these splotches were completely blacked out circles with fire as it spread. And you could see where his flesh was in this storm. I could see it. But the storm became smaller and smaller as the body of Christ prayed. I could see we were interceding, and it got smaller to the point where He could put the storm in His hand. I didn't see Him move off of the steps. He stood there the whole time looking out over the city of New York. I saw a brand-new Trump Tower being built, similar to what my son showed you—it could be the exact same tower. It shot up; it was a glass-front building and it had 'Trump' at the top of the building, not at the bottom base above the doors. It was at the top, and it said 'Trump.' It was beautiful. But as it went down, it went into a V that looked like a triangle base, similar to the building in Oklahoma City. If you know of the Oklahoma City building, it's a huge building with a V in it, but underneath it was an LED screen that had videos of President Trump. It looked like an advertisement of some kind. But as I was watching this, I saw Barron, and he had a bow tie on with a tuxedo jacket that went into fishtails, like the tails on a black tuxedo, which was very nice, with really shiny black shoes. He had a bow tie with a nice cummerbund, like you would have if you were dressed up for a wedding or a formal event. He looked very classy and nice. He was marching toward this building that looked like a skyscraper. It was a massive building that was bigger than the Trump Tower in New York; it was probably double the size. This massive, beautiful building. As I was looking at this, I saw Barron going up the stairs and he went inside the building. All of a sudden, the building started to have a blockchain. You know how the Matrix was spreading, like numbers? It was spreading all over this building. It lit up with green numbers that looked like bank codes. It was moving, and I could see the whole building become some kind of matrix. I don't know how to describe this; I'm trying my best. Eric was standing over to the side and all of a sudden, crypto coins were in front of him that became alive with legs, hands, and faces. Each one of them had symbols of which coin they were or what part of the blockchain they were. There were so many coins there. They were marching in a line, walking like M&Ms characters. You know how you see those M&Ms cartoon commercials? They have hands and they're like, 'I'm peanut and he's regular flavored.' It was the cartoon M&Ms. These looked like those coins, but they had white gloves with little black stick arms—like Mickey Mouse gloves—big white gloves, puffy hands, with big feet and little black stick legs that had huge shoes like little baby doll shoes. But the coins had big eyes and they were walking and became alive. All of a sudden, those coins were all in a line as it looked like he was driving them, with his tie messed up because he was looking at the whirlwind that was going around them. He started driving those coins toward that building. They went into the building. I got ahead of myself on this. They went into the building and then I saw the digital writing on the side of the building. As this was taking place, the building started to grow. It was very fat and had a very strong base at the bottom. The higher it went up, it got skinnier and it got a point at the top. It looked like a tower, and the further it went up, the skinnier it got. But it was a huge, strong platform base that would stand. It dwarfed the other Trump building, which became a lot smaller because of how big this building was. I thought it was really interesting as I was looking into this vision. This is how it all started. And the Lord said, 'Pray for Don Jr., pray for the Trumps.' Because it was double what was in the other building, and that was about their real estate in New York. I thought it was really interesting. It was very colorful. I could see the coins and they were waddling as they were going, like they were in a parade. You know, kind of like the Seven Dwarfs: 'Heigh-ho, Heigh-ho, it's off to work we go.' That's the way they were moving as they were dancing back and forth, going into the building. They were waddling. They weren't marching; they were waddling. And they went into the building. Then the Lord showed me Iran. I saw them being completely decimated to the point where all their buildings were on fire. I could see smoke and fire burning all over their oil. Oil was burning all over the place. It looked like something out of a Mad Max movie—bad times. I don't know how else to describe it to you. Iran looked like it was set back to the Stone Age. As I saw this, I saw Babylon—old Babylon—rising. I saw certain faces in Iraq that were being held back because of Iran's control. The Prince of Persia, the demonic spirit over Iran, had a hold of the financial system of Iraq. It had a very strong stronghold on it. His fingers were no longer able to grip it because of what was happening inside of its own place. And he perched himself on the mountain. I saw a demonic being, looking like a demonic bird, perching himself on the top of the mountain in Iran. And he sat there looking out. He was wounded. Trump wounded it. And I saw it sit there. But what once had a hold of Babylon no longer had a hold of it. I saw palm trees spring forth. I saw growth of business spring forth. I saw oil wells and oil derricks and money flowing. I saw Rolls-Royces, Ferraris, and Lamborghinis. I saw money going around Iraq. What was once being held back by Iran broke its fingers off. There was corruption still in Iraq, but it wasn't enough to keep it from doing what Iran was preventing it from doing. All of a sudden, I saw Maliki's face. I saw certain people that were puppets of Iran start to fade away and new leadership come in. I heard it would be blessed like Saudi Arabia. I saw MBS rise up and start to have a part in Iraq and other parts of the Middle East because the unwanted stepchild, Iran, was dealt with, and the beast system began to rise. I saw blessing coming on the Middle Eastern countries that had oil and gas wealth, starting to come up because a hindrance that was once there was no longer there. And I saw MBS start to really take shape as a leader like you've never seen before. I saw a two-state solution starting to be talked about with Israel, and I saw Jared Kushner was one of the forerunners of this. I saw him in a black coat, a black tie, and a white shirt, with dark circles under his eyes, as he was negotiating a two-state solution with MBS in the days ahead. I couldn't see past it. He knows I've discussed all this already. I think I'm just going to leave that alone. I don't want to talk yet. I know, I'm going to go there. I just don't want to talk anymore about Israel. Okay, right. So, as I was looking into this, I saw the beast system. I saw Russia, I saw Ukraine, and I saw the war. But as I was seeing this, I saw people coming to the table to talk about Ukraine. I saw Russia say, 'We want the whole thing,' but they got the land that they have conquered. And it was going clear up to Kyiv, and they were devising a plan of how to get rid of Zelensky. 'How do we eliminate Zelensky?' They wanted to bring in a proxy government—to bring in a new government over Ukraine because they wanted all of it to be pro-Russia and pro-Ukraine, but more pro-Russia than Zelensky, and to eliminate the man Volodymyr Zelensky off of the face of the earth. I saw a plan. As I was looking into this, I was taken to Taiwan. I could see lights and digital things coming up out of Taiwan, but I couldn't see any further than that for whatever reason. There was a barrier around Taiwan of prayer, and it was like lights of gold. I went to Cuba. I could see Cuba in fast-forward motion, like a time-lapse. All of a sudden, Cuba started growing with economic developments all on the northern side of the island facing towards America. It was growing with hotels and industry, and tourist cruise ships were going there. Major holiday spots—like people always say, 'Brandon, I want to go there for holiday; I want to go there for a vacation'—it looked like some kind of five-star resorts where you would be waited on hand and foot. It was just a blessing of relaxation. It looked like some kind of really classy five-star resorts all coming up on the shoreline. And I could see the auto industry, but it looked like something like Hawaii, like the economic development in Honolulu. That's all I can say. I could see men with nice linen shirts and nice hats, smoking cigars, playing golf, and relaxing as if they were on vacation. They were drinking special alcohol. It looked like a resort. As I was looking into it, I could see a great revival coming—all kinds of things when I was looking into Cuba last night. It looked like a blessing for the Cuban people. Then I was praying into California, and the Lord said, 'Do you see?' When I paused there, I could see California and I could see the people of California were fed up with Gavin, were fed up with the way their politics are going. As we uncover all this great fraud, I saw the people of California becoming outraged, saying 'enough is enough.' And the Lord said, 'Pray into this: a red wave of political shaking that would shake the United States and the world for a red wave that would try to come over California, flipping the governor to a Republican, flipping seats into the Republican House.' Like Nancy Pelosi, bye-bye. A new wave of red trying to spring forth out of California. Now, I'm not saying all of it, but I saw red like it was painted red across California. And the Lord said, 'Pray into that.' There's much more corruption that needs to be uncovered concerning this to bring the people into enlightenment and being enraged that they've been played. But the Lord said it's the same over Minnesota. Pray for a red wave over Minnesota, for a rising up of people who are fed up. I can still see going into November; I was praying into the election. The Lord said, 'You can win the Senate.' I saw it won by one. I was praying to keep it Republican by praying in the right leaders, and I saw one seat. Then I saw the House, and the Lord said, 'You can pray this,' and I saw the House staying by more than 20 seats. I saw the number 20. Remember 20? What was that about again? I saw 20. Was that something personal? Yes, it was. I've seen so much lately; that was something else. So, forgive me. I bring personal things in, but it all has to do with the same thing, doesn't it? Praying into the 20. I keep praying into these things that the Lord is talking to me about—my personal ministry, the time frames of things, and praying for President Trump because he said he's tired. He needs help. And that's why I tried to tell you all—I wasn't trying to pick at him last night, but I'm going to tell you, you must pray for him. He won't make it without our prayers. It gets to the point where you all need to have discernment for yourselves. You need to hear God for yourself, but you need to filter it with the Word. Everything you are hearing and how you try to correct me—filter it with the Scripture. Pray about our nation. Pray for us to be a sheep nation. Pray for us to stay and have a great revival. Pray for a shaking and awakening in the churches. But when you're praying and seeing into things, like I said, we see in part and hear in part. You think things are right here—it looks like it's right on your nose—but yet it's just a couple years out. It could be a little further out than what you think. Because in our natural mind, we don't understand the spirit realm when it comes to time. God's vast. There is no beginning and there is no end. So His timing of when He says something's coming—and you say, 'Soon, Brandon, when is soon?'—soon to God could be 10 years, 20 years, or a lot of things. But you don't try to add to or take away from anything you hear or see. I deliver it as I see it. To add a time frame to it would be really stupid. To say, 'Well, this is my opinion'—who cares about Brandon Biggs's opinion? I'm just as flawed as you all are. Everybody has issues. I don't exalt myself above anything. That's what I'm telling you all. I'm just human. I have issues I'm overcoming just like you all do. I'm just a person used just like you all are. Regardless, this channel and everything has just been God's grace. Everybody has something we're working through. Everyone has something that you're seeking Him for—healing, finances, protection, whatever it may be. But we work out our salvation with fear and trembling. That's what I try to tell you all: when you get real with God, God will become real to you. I get tired of all the celebrity charismatic Christian stuff; it is over the top. When you talk to people and they're real with you, they are just as real. They go through things just like you do. We're all a work in progress. Humble yourselves underneath the mighty hand of God. Humble yourself. That's the bottom line. There is so much spiritual pride, and I see it all the time. A lot of arrogant people, and you go, 'Hold on a minute. Don't you realize that I walk in a seer's anointing, and I can see all your mess, and I never tell anyone anything? I see the mess on a lot of people that think they have a lot going on for them. Some of them are on TV, and I look at them and go, 'But the Lord reveals everything about your business to tell me to pray for you.' He says, 'Listen, don't be like that. Humble yourself, Brandon. Remember the janitor.' It's interesting as a watchman because I see things that nobody else will see because the Lord allows me to. Then he shows me things about myself all the time, and I don't even feel worthy to do anything. Some days I say, 'God, thank God it's all by your grace,' but it really sets the stage for me to realize it has nothing to do with you and everything to do with how good God is and how merciful he is that he would even look in my direction. It's all by his grace. I said, 'God, thank you for using somebody like me.' The other night—I try to explain this all the time—I don't know if he's going to show up tonight. I don't control it. Sometimes people want you to snap your fingers and think you control it and make this happen. But I can't control any of it. I am yielded to him. I'm just here. If you choose to use me again, fine. But I don't know how long I'll be doing this because I don't control any of it. He could say, 'I'm done tomorrow,' and I'll be there saying, 'Well, okay. I'll go back to selling on eBay and Poshmark full-time, really hitting it hard, trying to find things to flip.' Diana does it now, but I used to help her with the measurements. I'd sit there for hours and measure all the clothes for the people because they always want to return them. eBay's return policy is terrible; you have to measure all the armpits and tell everybody if there's a stain. That was my job. Now Diana does that by herself, bless her heart. But it is what it is. I just want to tell you, that's why I try to say I'll pastor and I'll teach you all prayer and do what God's called me to do until he tells me to do something else. Whenever he told me about praying and having a theater in Branson, I didn't know when I would do it. I priced them; they're high dollar, millions of dollars. So you go, 'Okay, what does ministry look like?' I always say, 'What's your five-year plan? What's your 10-year goal?' If the Lord carries, where will I be by the time I'm such and such age, 50 or 60 years old, whatever? What do you want to do? Because I had a dream to get here to pray and do what God's called me to do, but it took years. As I was praying this morning, he said, 'You don't realize all the years that you were on the back side of the desert as a janitor at that church, being a janitor at that mega-ministry, being a janitor here and doing what I've called you to do. I was growing great taproots with you.' I said, 'What do you mean?' He said, 'You're freaking out because of all the fruit and all that I've done and how everything has happened so quickly, but it took years of cultivation that nobody saw. There were great roots that I've had growing way down deep. The greater the root, the greater the growth of the tree can be to sustain it because a strong wind can't blow over a tree that has great roots.' And he said just because you didn't see the outward growth doesn't mean I wasn't growing a deep taproot with you, Brandon and Diana. He said, 'Don't underestimate the 20-some years I had you being a janitor and doing what you did. There were great taproots as you said yes to everything I told you to do.' So I say to you, you may not see much fruit on the outside right now, but God has cultivated great taproots on the inside of you that have gone way down deep in the Holy Ghost soil, the soil of life. And you think, 'When is my time? When is God going to do this? When is he going to bring the promises of the prophecies spoken over my life?' He told me I was going to do this. I'm the coat of many colors, but yet I'm in the prison. That's what you may feel. I have a prophecy, a coat of many colors, and yet my brother sold me into slavery. And now I'm in Potiphar's house, and the blessing's on it and it's prospering, but his wife accused me of this and now I'm in prison. How many years go by? But the taproot was growing so deep in the soil that when Joseph got to the place of his time—it's time for you, buddy, to be second-in-command of all of Egypt—the fruit that was displayed came because the root went much deeper. Does that make sense? The character that it took to handle it so he wouldn't become arrogant. They would say, 'Look at you now. You were broken and you were humbled.' That's why I realize whenever the Lord speaks to me about some of these things he's told me to do, I keep that janitor in and I don't want to deviate from it. So help me because, honestly, the more this keeps growing, and I know I live in a Christian state... maybe it wouldn't be so bad in California; people might not notice me as much. But the more this happens, the more I grow. When you live in an area where there's a lot of believers, I'm not into the celebrity stuff. I just don't care about it. To me, this is like whatever. It's just growing pains, just learning how to deal with all this. This is a learning process for me. I'm just real with you. That's why I tell you when I come in here, I don't know if he's going to show up. I just trust. He says, 'Do it.' Okay, I'll do it. 'You want me to pray with the people tonight?' Yeah. 'What do you want me to say?' What you're saying. Certain things. He'll tell me to shut up like earlier. It's interesting because there's a lot of you that are believing for your manifestation of what you're believing for. I'm just telling you, Brandon Biggs, just try to be obedient. Whatever he's told me to do, I've done it. He said, 'Fill up the water pots like he did at the wedding supper.' And he said, 'It's not my time yet, woman.' Then he went up there and filled up the water pots and boom, the water turned into wine. Whatever he tells you to do, do it. I just do it. He said, 'I didn't call you to be in front of a pulpit yet. That day is coming. You go in front of a camera.' Hopefully that helps somebody. I know that's a lot of something, but I tried to tell you the process because this is all so interesting to me. Over the last three years—it'll be three years in June—of just growing, and now we reach millions and millions of people for Jesus every month. Millions, literally. All glory to God. Then Facebook contacted us today and said, 'We want to discuss things with you over the phone.' I said, 'I don't want to talk to you.' It was funny because they banned me, and then one of their big people reached out to us and said, 'We want to talk to you over the phone about some of the things you're posting and if you want to be reinstated back on our platform.' I think the whole thing is interesting because I was just like, 'What do they want to say to us over the phone?' But we'll talk to them and we'll go back on Facebook. Maybe I'll not compromise what God has told me to say. He said, 'I want you to say the hard things,' and I'll continue to do it and I'm sold out to it. It's not always going to be easy. He said, 'Brandon, I didn't tell you it would be easy. I said I'd be with you and it's doable.' I said, 'What am I supposed to say to that? I never told you it'd be easy.' Diana, we laugh about that all the time when Jesus said that. He said, 'I never told you it'd be easy.' Brandon, you have anything? I've talked way too long. Right. Yeah. What building is that, baby? I was trying to find that beat. No one sent a beat. It doesn't work. Don't worry about it. We're way past that now. Okay. So, we're going to pray over President Trump and the decision he's going to make by tomorrow. As I've rambled, I want you to hear what he said concerning this video about the spies. Do you remember when I told you we had rats? We have rats in the Pentagon. Does anybody remember? I want you just to be real. Do you remember when I told you there were rats in the Pentagon and I told you he had badges all over his vest? And I saw him. I saw a man and I said, 'Watch. There's rats in the Pentagon and he's leaking information.' Look at this. This is very interesting today. Does anybody remember me saying there were rats in the Pentagon? There's rats in the White House. There's rats. They're around President Trump. Now, listen to this. This is interesting when you add that to it. We have to find that leaker because that's a sick person. They probably didn't realize the extent of how bad it was. I can't imagine that the person did, but we're going to find out. It's national security, and the person that did the story will go to jail if he doesn't say. And that doesn't last long. I think everybody would understand it. They put this mission at great risk. They put that man at great risk and they put the hundreds of people that went in looking for him because everyone now knows that we're going in. Don't you think that's interesting? We have to figure out who the leaker is. Who's the leaker? Who's telling our secrets? Somebody in the press, but where'd they get it from? Who's the leaker? Who's leaking? Time is up actually today. So I gave him 11:00, I guess, indirectly. I thought it was inappropriate the day after Easter. I want to be a nice person. They have until tomorrow. Now we'll see what happens.
